title: Tools and armor of Obsidian
description: This mod add a full set of tools, armor an a bow, all of obsidian
body:
This mod add a full set of tools, armor an a bow, all of obsidian.  
Tools, bow and armor can be repaired and enchated.  
For the crafting you need the **Obsidian Ingot** that you can obtained from a block of Obsidian.

***The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)***

**Recipe for Obsidian Ingot** (The recipe can be reversed)  
![Recipe of Obsidian Ingot](https://i.imgur.com/RFddCzF.png)

**Tools** (All tools are better of netherite version, with more damage and more durability)

**Obsidian Sword**  
**ATTACK: 10 SPEED: 1.6**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Sword](https://i.imgur.com/66rGkIL.png)

**Obsidian Bow**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Bow](https://i.imgur.com/WfmqBf4.png)

**Obsidian Axe**  
**ATTACK: 13 SPEED: 1.0**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Axe](https://i.imgur.com/JbV9mSs.png)

**Obsidian Pickaxe**  
**ATTACK: 7 SPEED: 1.2**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Pickaxe](https://i.imgur.com/8Gkgizw.png)

**Obsidian Shovel**  
**ATTACK: 7 SPEED: 1.0**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Shovel](https://i.imgur.com/XeCWtK9.png)

**Obsidian Hoe**  
**ATTACK: 1 SPEED: 4.0**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Hoe](https://i.imgur.com/QRcRMdj.png)

**Armor** (All pieces of armor are: Knocback Resistance 5, Armor Toughness 5. More durability and protection of netherite version)

**Obsidian Helmet**  
**ARMOR: 5**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Helmet](https://i.imgur.com/LHKhpT4.png)

**Obsidian Chestplate**  
**ARMOR: 10**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Chestplate](https://i.imgur.com/2aM6lOJ.png)

**Obsidian Leggings**  
**ARMOR: 8**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Leggings](https://i.imgur.com/0oNzahb.png)

**Obsidian Boots**  
**ARMOR: 5**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Boots](https://i.imgur.com/q2bzbKd.png)

**Obsidian Horse Armor**  
![Recipe of Obsidian Boots](https://i.imgur.com/YN9A4dw.png)
